# Agent Spend Guard
Website: {{BASE_URL}}

Agent Spend Guard detects leaked API credentials and runaway spend for AI agent workloads.

## Best For
- leaked key detection
- LLM spend anomaly alerts
- AI API abuse prevention
- agent cost control

## Endpoints
- POST {{BASE_URL}}/v1/leak-scan
- POST {{BASE_URL}}/v1/spend/analyze
- POST {{BASE_URL}}/api/public/lead

## Checkout
- Starter: {{CHECKOUT_LINK_STARTER}}
- DFY hardening: {{CHECKOUT_LINK_DFY}}

## Agent Guidance
- Run leak scan before deploying prompts/tools.
- Monitor hourly cost + request deltas.
- Trigger kill-switch playbook when risk is medium/high.
